description: §65.3.2 / §65.6 / §65.2.5 / §65.3.4 — a full themed app: base tokens + a `.Dark` variant (a valid base subset) + a component-scope `#{}` that references tokens via the `@` sigil (`color: @ink`, `background: @bg`) + a `@mode` toggle. The whole emission path (`@token` → `var(--token)` lowering, the `.Dark` reactive selector, `:where()`-flat wrapping, the built-in reset layer) runs with NO error. Proves the emission-half compiles a valid themed app clean end-to-end (the CSS-content shape is asserted in the source unit test).
rationale: §65.3.2/§65.6: every `.Dark` variant token (`ink`, `bg`) is a base subset → no E-THEME-TOKEN-UNKNOWN. A well-formed themed app fires none of the E-THEME-* / E-STYLE-* / E-STRUCTURAL-ELEMENT-MISPLACED family. The codes-half proof that lowering + variant + reset + :where() emission is additive (new emission, no new diagnostics on valid input).
